title: 4K finally playable
content: Upgrade from RTX 3070: 4K Ultra playable now. Cyberpunk 4K DLSS Quality > 80fps. Night and day difference.

title: Best money can buy for gaming
content: 4K 120Hz on LG C3 OLED. Every game maxed out. Also use for Stable Diffusion SDXL - 24GB VRAM is king.

title: Bought 3 of these
content: WD SN770 for OS, games, and data drive. All 3 running perfectly. Best value NVMe period.

title: Samsung premium quality
content: 990 Pro: 7450 MB/s read verified in CrystalDiskMark. MagicianSoftware monitors health. Zero issues 1 year.

title: 5 years strong
content: Corsair RM850x running 5 years, upgraded from GTX 1080 to RTX 4080 Super, still plenty headroom.

title: Build PC đầu đời thành công
content: Theo hướng dẫn build 15 triệu. R5 5600 + RTX 4060. Boot lần đầu thành công! FHD Ultra mọi game.
pros: ["Hướng dẫn chi tiết","Boot 1 lần","FHD gaming excellent"]

title: Từ laptop lên desktop: wow
content: Desktop 20 triệu mạnh gấp 3 laptop gaming 25 triệu. 1440p gaming smooth. Build đáng tiền.

title: Dream PC achieved
content: 7800X3D + 4070 Super = 1440p Ultra dream. V-Cache FPS boost real. AM5 future ready.
cons: ["Total cost hơi cao khi tính cả peripheral"]

title: Content creation + Gaming dual purpose
content: i7-14700K + 4070 Ti Super: Premiere Pro 4K edit + gaming 1440p Ultra. 64GB RAM cho timeline lớn.
pros: ["Dual purpose perfect","64GB RAM smooth","4K editing capable"]

title: Văn phòng mượt mà
content: R5 5600G build 7 triệu: Word, Excel, web, email mượt. Không cần GPU rời = tiết kiệm.
pros: ["Tiết kiệm chi phí","Đủ cho văn phòng","Vega 7 light gaming"]

title: Video editing machine
content: R9 7900X + 4070 Ti Super + 64GB: 4K timeline mượt, export nhanh nhờ NVENC. Worth it cho freelancer.
pros: ["4K editing smooth","NVENC encoding fast","64GB timeline large"]

title: 4090 build insane
content: i9-14900K + RTX 4090: 4K Ultra 120fps on LG OLED. Best gaming experience possible. Worth every đồng.

title: Stream setup perfect
content: 7800X3D + 4070 Super: stream 1080p60 + game 1440p Ultra. Viewer say stream quality excellent.

title: Tournament ready keyboard
content: Logitech G Pro X: tôi dùng cho tournament Valorant. Wireless lag-free. Hot-swap switch tiện.

title: Aim improved 15%
content: Upgrade từ chuột 120g sang G Pro X Superlight 60g: aim noticeably better. Lighter = faster flick.

title: Best bang for buck headset
content: HyperX Cloud II 3 năm vẫn chạy tốt. Comfortable cả ngày, mic clear. 1.2 triệu quá worth.

title: Premium audio experience
content: Arctis Nova Pro Wireless: ANC on airplane, dual wireless cho PC + phone. DAC + Hi-Res = audiophile approved.

title: Budget mechanical tuyệt vời
content: RK84 800k: Gateron Brown switches, wireless + wired, 75% layout. Typing + gaming đều OK.

title: Server dev build
content: 14400F cho dev server: Docker containers chạy mượt, compile TypeScript nhanh. 10C/16T đủ cho dev.
pros: ["Dev workflow smooth","Docker + VS Code OK","Budget friendly"]

title: Photoshop + Light Gaming
content: RTX 4060 CUDA accelerate Photoshop filters. After work gaming FHD excellent. Dual purpose GPU.

title: Photo library lightning fast
content: 990 Pro cho Lightroom catalog 50K+ photos. Import, export, develop preset áp dụng siêu nhanh.

title: iRacing perfection
content: 7800X3D V-Cache cho sim racing (iRacing, ACC) FPS cao + consistent frame time. VR ready.

title: Blender Cycles render GOD
content: RTX 4090 Blender Cycles CUDA: render giảm từ 45 phút xuống 8 phút vs RTX 3070. 24GB VRAM cho heavy scenes.

title: WFH productivity boost
content: 27" 1440p desktop rộng hơn 1080p = thêm code, thêm browser. After 5pm: gaming 165Hz smooth.

title: Clean setup achieved
content: 4000D Airflow + white build: clean, minimal, airflow tốt. Cable management easy with routing channels.

title: Quiet + Cool is possible
content: Arctic LF II 360 on i9-14900K: 80°C stress test at 800RPM fans. Can't hear it at all from desk.

title: PSU nên đầu tư đàng hoàng
content: RM850x 850W Gold: chạy i9 + 4080S no problem. 10 năm BH = peace of mind. Fan 0RPM khi idle.

title: AM5 investment
content: B650 Tomahawk cho R5 7600 bây giờ, upgrade 8800X3D sau. DDR5 + PCIe 5.0 SSD ready. Smart invest.

title: Reliable daily driver
content: Chạy 6 tháng zero issues. Game + work dual purpose.

title: Perfect for 15M build
content: 14400F + 4060 = FHD Ultra king. 15 triệu well spent.

title: Endgame AM5 gaming CPU
content: Bought this knowing it's the best. Not disappointed. CS2 400fps+.

title: VR gaming perfect
content: 7800X3D V-Cache giúp VR reprojection ít hơn. Quest 3 PCVR smooth.

title: Entry DLSS 3 experience
content: First NVIDIA card with DLSS 3 Frame Gen. Cyberpunk từ 45fps lên 80fps!

title: Perfect for 1080p monitor
content: Paired with 24" 1080p 144Hz: perfect match. Every game > 100fps.

title: Upgrade from RTX 2070
content: Huge jump! 1440p Ultra from 40fps to 100fps+. DLSS 3 bonus.

title: SFF build friendly
content: ITX model fits NR200P. 1440p gaming in SFF case. Power efficient.

title: 4K gaming finally real
content: LG C3 OLED 4K 120Hz + 4080 Super = gaming nirvana. DLSS 3 makes everything smooth.

title: Recommendation for everyone
content: Recommend SN770 to every friend building PC. Fast enough, cheap enough.

title: Boot + game drive perfect
content: Windows boot 8 seconds. Cyberpunk load 12 seconds. What more do you need?

title: Content creation must-have
content: Premiere Pro media cache on 990 Pro = timeline butter smooth. 4K scrubbing no lag.

title: Upgrade from cheap PSU
content: Switched from no-name 500W to RM850x. System more stable, quieter, no more random restarts.

title: First build case perfect
content: 4000D Airflow = first build dream. Spacious, cable management channels, mesh front.

title: White version gorgeous
content: 4000D white + RGB fans = clean white build aesthetic.

title: Showcase build achieved
content: O11D EVO + 9 UNI fans + AIO side mount = Instagram worthy build.

title: 400k wonder
content: AK400 on i5-12400F: gaming 62°C. Can't believe 400k cooler this good.

title: Budget AIO king
content: Arctic LF II 360 cho i9-14900K: max 82°C. Rẻ hơn Corsair/NZXT 1-2 triệu.

title: Can't go back to 1080p
content: Once you go 1440p 27", 1080p looks pixelated. Desktop productivity also much better.

title: Colors I never knew existed
content: OLED monitor first impression: WOW. Dark scenes in games look incredible. Movie watching elevated.

title: Still going strong in 2024
content: 12400F + B660 + DDR4-3200: chơi mọi eSports 144fps+. Budget king 2 năm running.

title: AM4 endgame value
content: R5 5600 giá 2.5tr. Combo AM4 đã mature. FHD gaming no problem.

title: Streaming machine
content: 20C/28T: OBS 1080p60 + game 1440p + Chrome đều mượt simultaneously.

title: Compile code 2x faster
content: From R5 3600 to R9 7950X: compile time halved. Docker build cũng nhanh gấp đôi.

title: AMD budget gaming
content: RX 7600 FHD gaming: Valorant 200fps, CS2 150fps, Cyberpunk 50fps Medium.

title: 16GB VRAM future
content: RX 7800 XT 16GB: 1440p native gaming strong. Future-proof VRAM. Giá hợp lý.

title: AMD flagship beast
content: 24GB VRAM, 4K rasterization near 4080. Rẻ hơn 5 triệu = value cho non-RT gamers.

title: 1440p DLSS sweet spot
content: 4060 Ti + DLSS 3: 1440p High 80fps most games. Good upgrade from GTX 1660.

title: Cheapest Intel board
content: B660 DS3H 2 triệu: chạy i5-12400F perfect. Basic nhưng reliable. 1 M.2 đủ.

title: Z790 for OC
content: Z790 Tomahawk: i5-14600K OC 5.5GHz all-core. VRM phase mạnh. WiFi 6E.

title: AM5 perfect pair
content: DDR5-6000 CL30 EXPO on R7 7700X: FPS tăng 8-12% vs JEDEC 4800. Must enable!

title: DDR4 budget OK
content: Corsair LPX DDR4-3200 CL16: basic nhưng chạy tốt trên B660/B550. Low-profile fit any cooler.

title: 500k AIO alternative
content: Thermalright PA120 SE 500k: hiệu năng ngang AIO 240mm. 2 fan, 6 heatpipe. Insane value.

title: Huyền thoại tản nhiệt
content: NH-D15 trên i9-14900K non-OC: max 88°C. Yên lặng đến mức nghe nhạc không cần headphone.

title: 5 sao xứng đáng
content: Dùng 3 tháng, hoạt động perfect. Không có gì phải phàn nàn.

title: Upgrade đáng giá
content: Nâng cấp từ đời cũ lên sản phẩm này: khác biệt rõ rệt. Worth it.

title: Build quality tốt
content: Chất lượng build tốt, packaging cẩn thận. Warranty card đầy đủ.

title: Chạy mát, yên tĩnh
content: Nhiệt độ hoạt động tốt, không ồn. Phù hợp cho build silent.

title: Gaming mượt mà
content: Chơi game mượt mà, FPS ổn định, không drop frame. Rất hài lòng.

title: Phục vụ công việc tốt
content: Dùng cho công việc hàng ngày: nhanh, ổn định, không lag.

title: Hàng chính hãng, yên tâm
content: Hàng chính hãng, tem nhãn đầy đủ. Bảo hành rõ ràng. Mua ở đây yên tâm.
